notes.hubListing: Hub/topic lists use sortAndFilterLessonsForPathwayContext which filters !publicComplete.
notes.paywall: Unauthorized users: visibleSectionsForLesson + sanitizePaywallPreviewSection; JSON-LD description truncated; no full audio/editorial notices.
notes.sitemap: listPathwayLessonSlugBatch may still list slugs that 404 on detail until batching filters public-complete rows.
